import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = list.len(tokens)
  mut out = ""
  mut i = n - 1
  while i >= 0
    let tok = match list.get(tokens, i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    if i == n - 1
      out = "#{tok}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{tok}"
    end
    i = i - 1
  end
  println(out)
  Ok(())
end
